title: The Dangerous Little Demon
writer: Mildred Considine, Doris Schroeder, Irving Thalberg
actors: Marie Prevost, Jack Perrin, Robert Ellis
plot: Teddy Harmon, a society girl preoccupied with pleasure, is persuaded by her father's serious-minded secretary that she is in love with him, but meeting his family, she becomes bored and seeks the society of Gary McVeigh, a wealthy...
